query:
INSERT INTO public.questions (
    id, question_text, question_type, options, correct_answer, explanation, hint,
    stimulus_text, stimulus_type, section, topic, difficulty, exam_type,
    is_platform_question, ai_generated, calculator_allowed, subject, subtopic,
    math_domain, pool_key, diagnostic_eligible, tags, external_id, source, source_metadata
  ) VALUES
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'The main point of the passage is that:',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"Media can be used to shape people''s opinions and beliefs.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The media is a powerful tool that can be used to educate people.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"It is important to be critical consumers of information.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The media is a powerful tool that can be used to entertain people.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'The passage states that media can be used to shape people''s understanding of the world. This is a way of saying that media can influence people''s opinions and beliefs. The other choices are not supported by the passage.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'This passage is about the impact of media on society. The author believes that the media can have a profound impact on people''s lives. The author also believes that it is important to be aware of the media''s influence and to be critical consumers of information.  The author states that "the media is a powerful tool that can be used to shape our understanding of the world."',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Information and Ideas']::text[],
    '472e85c5_english_01300',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Information and Ideas","section":"english","opensat_raw_id":"472e85c5","opensat_index":1300}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice correctly punctuates the following sentence: "The professor, an expert in Renaissance literature, delivered a lecture on the works of Shakespeare,  but the students seemed disinterested." ',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The professor, an expert in Renaissance literature, delivered a lecture on the works of Shakespeare but the students seemed disinterested.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The professor, an expert in Renaissance literature, delivered a lecture on the works of Shakespeare, but the students seemed disinterested.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The professor, an expert in Renaissance literature, delivered a lecture on the works of Shakespeare; but the students seemed disinterested.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The professor, an expert in Renaissance literature delivered a lecture on the works of Shakespeare, but the students seemed disinterested.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'A comma is needed to separate the introductory phrase "The professor, an expert in Renaissance literature" from the rest of the sentence.  A comma is also needed before the coordinating conjunction "but" to separate the two independent clauses.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    NULL,
    NULL,
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Standard English Conventions']::text[],
    'opensat_a6a5289a3dd094af_english_01301',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Standard English Conventions","section":"english","opensat_raw_id":"random_id_c4","opensat_index":1301}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice best revises the sentence to correct the error in the underlined portion?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The author, who is a well-known writer, is currently working on a new novel.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The author, being a well-known writer, is currently working on a new novel.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The author, a well-known writer, is currently working on a new novel.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The author, whom is a well-known writer, is currently working on a new novel.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'C',
    'The underlined portion of the sentence is a misplaced modifier because the phrase "which is a well-known writer" doesn''t clearly modify the noun "author." The phrase should be placed immediately after the noun "author." Choice C is the only choice that places the phrase in the correct position.  Choice A is incorrect because the pronoun "who" should be used to refer to a person, not a thing. Choice B is incorrect because the participial phrase "being a well-known writer" is not grammatically correct in this context. Choice D is incorrect because the pronoun "whom" should be used to refer to the object of a verb or preposition, not the subject of a clause.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The best way to ensure that a piece of writing is clear is to carefully consider its structure.  For example, it is important to use transitions to connect ideas and to use parallel structure to create a sense of balance. Additionally, it is important to avoid using unnecessary words and phrases. The following sentence demonstrates one way to make a piece of writing more concise, and it also demonstrates one way to ensure that the sentence has a clear and logical structure. 

The author, which is a well-known writer, is currently working on a new novel.',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Standard English Conventions']::text[],
    '1f2f37a9_english_01302',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Standard English Conventions","section":"english","opensat_raw_id":"1f2f37a9","opensat_index":1302}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'The use of the metaphor of "weaving" in the passage primarily serves to',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"describe the speaker’s physical actions.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"explain the speaker’s emotional state.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"emphasize the speaker’s artistic talent.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"suggest that the speaker’s work is difficult.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'C',
    'The metaphor of "weaving" is used to emphasize the speaker''s artistic talent by drawing a comparison to the intricate and delicate process of creating a tapestry. This metaphor highlights the speaker''s skill and dedication, as well as the complex nature of their work.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The author uses a metaphor to compare the speaker’s feelings to the process of "weaving." The speaker, a weaver, creates intricate tapestries with their hands, while the reader is invited to contemplate the delicate balance of the threads. The use of this metaphor serves to emphasize the speaker’s skill, dedication, and the complex nature of their work. What is the purpose of the metaphor?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Craft and Structure',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Craft and Structure',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Craft and Structure']::text[],
    'opensat_c42f88769d3fd539_english_01303',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Craft and Structure","section":"english","opensat_raw_id":"random_id_1","opensat_index":1303}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'In the opening paragraph, the author uses the word "mysteries" to',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"create a sense of awe and wonder.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"emphasize the vastness of the universe.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"suggest that the universe is full of danger.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"explain the scientific methods used to study the universe.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'The author uses the word "mysteries" to suggest that the universe contains elements that are beyond the scope of human understanding. This creates a sense of awe and wonder, which can help the reader feel more engaged with the topic.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'In the opening paragraph, the author explains that the subject of the text is the “nature” of the universe. The author continues by saying that the universe is “too grand” for human beings to fully comprehend. The author then goes on to suggest that the universe contains “mysteries” that are beyond the scope of human understanding.  What is the most likely reason why the author uses the word “mysteries”?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Craft and Structure',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Craft and Structure',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Craft and Structure']::text[],
    'f87234fa_english_01304',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Craft and Structure","section":"english","opensat_raw_id":"f87234fa","opensat_index":1304}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'In this passage, the author uses a variety of rhetorical devices to',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"create a sense of urgency and excitement.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"emphasize the speaker’s feelings and experiences.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"suggest that the speaker is addressing a large audience.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"describe the speaker’s physical surroundings.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'The author uses rhetorical devices to help the reader understand the speaker’s experience of the natural world. The metaphors, imagery, and personification all help to create a vivid and emotional picture of the speaker’s experience.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The author uses a variety of rhetorical devices to support the claim that the speaker is overwhelmed by the natural world. For example, the speaker uses metaphors to compare the landscape to a "drowning sea" and a "suffocating blanket." The speaker also uses imagery to describe the sights and sounds of the natural world, and the speaker uses personification to give human qualities to the natural world. What is the most likely reason why the writer uses these rhetorical devices?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Craft and Structure',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Craft and Structure',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Craft and Structure']::text[],
    'opensat_dd86c91dfa6e879b_english_01305',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Craft and Structure","section":"english","opensat_raw_id":"random_id_d7","opensat_index":1305}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'The dog, which was happy to see its owner, ______ its tail excitedly.',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"wag","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"wagged","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"wagging","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"wags","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'The sentence requires a past tense verb to match the past tense verb "was." Of the choices given, only "wagged" is in the past tense.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    NULL,
    NULL,
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Standard English Conventions']::text[],
    '499cb491_english_01306',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Standard English Conventions","section":"english","opensat_raw_id":"499cb491","opensat_index":1306}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice best describes the function of the phrase "This choice helps to create a sense of intimacy and connection with the reader" in the passage?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"It explains the significance of the author''s choice to use the word \"you.\"","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"It provides a definition of the word \"you.\"","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"It compares the author''s use of \"you\" to other devices.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"It suggests that the author uses \"you\" sparingly.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'The phrase "This choice helps to create a sense of intimacy and connection with the reader" explains why the author uses "you." The phrase directly connects the author’s use of "you" to the effect it has on the reader.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The author uses several devices to create an engaging narrative voice, including the use of vivid imagery and personal anecdotes. The author also uses a conversational tone, addressing the reader directly with the word "you." This choice helps to create a sense of intimacy and connection with the reader.',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Standard English Conventions']::text[],
    '82b8f914_english_01307',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Standard English Conventions","section":"english","opensat_raw_id":"82b8f914","opensat_index":1307}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'What transition word does the author use to signal the shift in tone in the second sentence of this passage?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"And","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"But","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"However","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"Therefore","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'The word "But" is the transition word that signals the shift in tone.  It contrasts the first sentence''s admiration with the second sentence''s acknowledgement of potential downsides.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The author''s tone is best described as admiring, but the writer also acknowledges the potential downsides of the subject in the second sentence.  The author emphasizes the significance of this by using a transition word. What word is used to make this shift in the author''s tone?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Craft and Structure',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Craft and Structure',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Craft and Structure']::text[],
    'opensat_7a4215bc5312f3e3_english_01308',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Craft and Structure","section":"english","opensat_raw_id":"random_id_e1","opensat_index":1308}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'The author of this passage suggests that artificial intelligence is',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"a positive force that will create new opportunities for human workers.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"a negative force that will displace human workers.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"a force that will lead to a future in which human workers are no longer needed.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"a force that will fundamentally change the nature of human work.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'D',
    'The passage discusses both the positive and negative impacts of artificial intelligence on the future of work. However, the author ultimately suggests that artificial intelligence will fundamentally change the nature of human work.  The author does not state that artificial intelligence is a positive force, a negative force, or a force that will lead to a future in which human workers are no longer needed. Instead, the author focuses on the ways that artificial intelligence is changing the nature of human work.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The passage discusses a number of ways that the process of "artificial intelligence" is changing the nature of human work. The author focuses on the ways that artificial intelligence is automating tasks that were once performed by humans. The author also points out that artificial intelligence is creating new jobs and opportunities. According to the passage, which of the following statements best describes the author’s view of the impact of artificial intelligence on the future of work?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Information and Ideas']::text[],
    'opensat_524accf5288aba31_english_01309',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Information and Ideas","section":"english","opensat_raw_id":"random_id_a2","opensat_index":1309}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"has been open","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"is open","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"was open","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"opened","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'The sentence describes a situation that began in the past and continues to the present. Therefore, the present perfect tense, "has been open," is the correct choice.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The world’s largest collection of Shakespearean artifacts, the Folger Shakespeare Library,  _____ to the public since 1932, attracting thousands of visitors each year. It houses over 80,000 books and manuscripts, as well as rare first editions of Shakespeare’s plays.',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Standard English Conventions']::text[],
    'opensat_7b70cff1fd34579e_english_01310',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Standard English Conventions","section":"english","opensat_raw_id":"random_id_c5","opensat_index":1310}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'The author of this passage suggests that acknowledging and addressing people’s doubts and concerns is important because it',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"allows the reader to focus on the benefits of the new approach.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"helps the reader to understand the new approach more fully.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"makes the new approach seem more appealing to the reader.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"encourages the reader to share their own opinions and experiences.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'C',
    'The author argues that the most effective way to persuade others is to address their doubts and concerns directly. By doing so, the author suggests that the new approach will seem more appealing to the reader.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The author argues that the most effective way to persuade others to adopt a new approach is to address their doubts and concerns directly. The author suggests that rather than simply stating the benefits of the new approach, it is important to acknowledge the potential drawbacks and difficulties that people may have with it. In this way, the author suggests that the new approach will seem more appealing to the reader, who is likely to be more receptive to it once their concerns have been addressed. What is the most likely reason why the author suggests that addressing people’s doubts and concerns directly is the most effective way to persuade them?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Expression of Ideas',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Expression of Ideas',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Expression of Ideas']::text[],
    'opensat_0c30d3b384885de8_english_01311',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Expression of Ideas","section":"english","opensat_raw_id":"random_id_c5","opensat_index":1311}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Langston Hughes’s work is best described as',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"a reflection of the unique experiences of African Americans in Harlem and other urban centers.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"a celebration of the cultural and artistic achievements of the Harlem Renaissance.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"a call for social and political change in the United States.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"a rejection of the traditional forms of American literature.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'The passage focuses on how Hughes’s poetry captures the experiences of African Americans in Harlem and other urban centers. The passage highlights the specific themes, musical influences, and historical context that shaped Hughes’s work.  The other options are too broad or do not accurately reflect the main idea of the passage.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'In the early 1900s, the poet Langston Hughes was a central figure in the Harlem Renaissance, a cultural movement that celebrated African American culture and artistry.  Hughes’s poems reflected the experiences and perspectives of African Americans living in Harlem and other urban centers in the United States.  His work often incorporated elements of jazz music and blues music, which were popular forms of music in the African American community at the time.  Hughes’s work helped to raise awareness of the struggles and triumphs of African Americans during a period of significant social and political change.  Hughes’s poems were widely read and admired by both African Americans and white Americans, and his work helped to shape the course of American literature. Which statement best summarizes the main idea of the passage?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Information and Ideas']::text[],
    '489e14b7_english_01312',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Information and Ideas","section":"english","opensat_raw_id":"489e14b7","opensat_index":1312}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which of the following best describes the main idea of the passage?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The internet is a valuable resource for learning new things, but it is important to be careful about the information you find online.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The internet has made it possible for people to learn new skills and to stay up-to-date on the latest news.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The internet is a powerful tool, but it should be used with caution.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The internet is a source of misinformation and should not be trusted.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'The passage acknowledges the benefits of the internet but warns readers about the potential for misinformation. Choice A accurately reflects this balance.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The popularity of the internet has made it easier than ever to learn about new things. There are thousands of websites dedicated to sharing information about any topic imaginable. And many people use the internet to research the latest news, find recipes, or learn new skills. However, the internet can also be a source of misinformation. It is important to be critical of the information you find online and to verify facts before you accept them as true.',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Information and Ideas']::text[],
    '27b12601_english_01313',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Information and Ideas","section":"english","opensat_raw_id":"27b12601","opensat_index":1313}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'The word "bustling" is used to',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"create a sense of nostalgia for a bygone era.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"convey the energy and excitement of the city.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"emphasize the importance of the city''s history.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"suggest that the city was a place of great beauty.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'The word "bustling" suggests a dynamic and lively city, conveying the energy and excitement of the city during the early 20th century.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The author of the passage is trying to convey that the city was an important center for the arts during the early twentieth century. In order to emphasize the city’s cultural significance, the author uses a variety of descriptive details. The author describes the city''s buildings, its parks, and its people. The author also includes anecdotes and quotations that illustrate the city''s artistic spirit. What is the effect of using the word ''bustling''?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Standard English Conventions']::text[],
    '956f234a_english_01314',
    'college_board_opensat',

    'C',
    'The passage focuses on the complexities of memory research and the limitations of current knowledge.     'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The study of how the human brain remembers information, and the processes involved in the formation, storage, and retrieval of memories, is a complex and evolving field of research. Researchers have made significant progress in uncovering the mechanisms by which memories are encoded, consolidated, and recalled, but many mysteries remain. One particularly perplexing phenomenon is the so-called "tip-of-the-tongue" experience, in which individuals struggle to recall a specific word or piece of information, even though they are confident that they know it.
